evals.expected_output: A structured verification report for US-001 (Admin middleware and route protection) checking: admin.ts middleware file exists, it checks isAdmin from useAuthState(), non-admin redirect to / with toast, reports.vue has middleware applied, typecheck passes. Should produce a pass/fail table.

A structured verification report for US-005 (GraphQL getAdminStats query and resolver) checking: getAdminStats query in schema.graphql, AdminStats type with 6 fields, resolver function files exist in terraform/functions/, admin group check in resolver, adminStats.ts type file exists, admin.ts GraphQL query string exists, terraform modules wired in main.tf, typecheck passes. Should produce a pass/fail table.

A quick verification of US-008 (Users list page) checking: users.vue page exists with admin layout/middleware, table with expected columns, UBadge usage for status, search input with debounce, pagination with nextToken, loading skeletons, selectedUserId ref for detail panel, typecheck passes. Browser verification should be marked DEFERRED (not skipped) since US-008 is a UI story — story cannot be marked passes: true until browser verification completes.
